title: English (GB)
translate_instructions: Use British English spelling (colour, organise, centre).

title: عربي (Arabic)
translate_instructions: Use Modern Standard Arabic. Text direction is right-to-left.

title: বাংলা (Bengali)
translate_instructions: Use standard Bengali script.

title: български (Bulgarian)
translate_instructions: Use Cyrillic script.

title: Deutsch (German)
translate_instructions: Use formal 'Sie' form for UI text. Capitalize all nouns.

title: Ελληνικά (Greek)
translate_instructions: Use Modern Greek.

title: Español (Spanish)
translate_instructions: Use formal 'usted' form for UI text. Use European Spanish.

title: فارسی (Persian)
translate_instructions: Use Persian script. Text direction is right-to-left.

title: Français (French Canada)
translate_instructions: Use formal 'vous' form. Use Canadian French expressions and spelling.

title: Français (French France)
translate_instructions: Use formal 'vous' form. Use European French.

title: עברית (Hebrew)
translate_instructions: Use Modern Hebrew. Text direction is right-to-left.

title: हिंदी (Hindi)
translate_instructions: Use Devanagari script. Keep technical terms in English when no Hindi equivalent exists.

title: Italiano (Italian)
translate_instructions: Use formal 'Lei' form for UI text.

title: 日本語 (Japanese)
translate_instructions: Use appropriate mix of Kanji, Hiragana, and Katakana. Use Katakana for foreign/technical terms.

title: ქართული (Georgian)
translate_instructions: Use Georgian script (Mkhedruli).

title: 한국어 (Korean)
translate_instructions: Use Hangul. Use formal polite speech level (합쇼체).

title: मराठी (Marathi)
translate_instructions: Use Devanagari script.

title: Norsk (Norwegian)
translate_instructions: Use Bokmål.

title: ਪੰਜਾਬੀ (Punjabi)
translate_instructions: Use Gurmukhi script.

title: Português (Portuguese Brazil)
translate_instructions: Use Brazilian Portuguese spelling and expressions.

title: Português (Portuguese Portugal)
translate_instructions: Use European Portuguese spelling and expressions.

title: Русский (Russian)
translate_instructions: Use Cyrillic script. Use formal form for UI text.

title: Српски (Serbian)
translate_instructions: Use Cyrillic script.

title: தமிழ் (Tamil)
translate_instructions: Use Tamil script.

title: తెలుగు (Telugu)
translate_instructions: Use Telugu script.

title: ไทย (Thai)
translate_instructions: Use Thai script. No spaces between words.

title: Українська (Ukrainian)
translate_instructions: Use Cyrillic script.

title: Tiếng Việt (Vietnamese)
translate_instructions: Use Vietnamese diacritics.

title: 简体中文 (Chinese Simplified)
translate_instructions: Use Simplified Chinese characters.

title: 繁體中文 (Chinese Traditional)
translate_instructions: Use Traditional Chinese characters.

title: 🐶 (Doge)
translate_instructions: Use Doge meme speak: much, very, so, wow, such. Example: 'Settings' -> 'much settings wow'.
